transactions.committee: AMERICAN ISRAEL PUBLIC AFFAIRS COMMITTEE POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEE

organizations.role: Past Board Chair (2009-2012); helped create Austin Hate Crimes Task Force; expanded No Place for Hate program
organizations.notes: Wikipedia biography of Steve Adler (58th Austin mayor 2015-2023) explicitly documents he "served as the board chair of the Anti-Defamation League Austin Region" from 2009 to 2012 and notes ADL board-chair work alongside Texas Tribune/Ballet Austin civic roles. Disambiguation: Fuentes donor listed as "mayor" at Austin 78701 matches Steve Adler, former Austin mayor.
Helped establish the Austin ADL chapter. Per PolitiFact 2014: led board 2009-2012. Per Forward: "He made ADL the go-to civil rights organization in Austin" — Kirk Rudy quote.

organizations.role: 2022 Raymond & Audrey Maislin Humanitarian Award honoree; prior 2010 Torch of Liberty Co-Chair
organizations.notes: Shalom Austin Dec 2022 "ADL Austin Honors Eugene Sepulveda and Steven Tomlinson at Golden Door Awards Dinner" confirms 2022 Maislin Humanitarian Award at JW Marriott Oct 25, 2022. Disambiguation: Harper-Madison filings list name first/last reversed ("Eugene, Sepulveda") with employer "ceo entrepreneurs foundation" at Austin 78705, matching Eugene Sepulveda, CEO of Entrepreneurs Foundation and Culturati co-founder.

organizations.role: True Colors: Shake the Hate Featured Speaker (2012)
organizations.notes: Featured speaker. Muslim woman who shared story about facing discrimination post-9/11 in Austin. Introduced by ADL Austin Community Director Karen Gross.

organizations.role: Board involvement (Adler-era); 2017 Maislin Humanitarian Award co-honoree
organizations.notes: Spouse of former Mayor Steve Adler; DT Land Group commercial real estate

organizations.role: 2017 Raymond & Audrey Maislin Humanitarian Award honoree (with husband Steve Adler)
organizations.notes: ADL Austin Facebook video (2017) titled "ADL Honors Mayor Steve Adler & Diane T. Land" confirms she received the Raymond and Audrey Maislin Humanitarian Award with husband Stephen Adler at the 2017 Golden Door Gala. Disambiguation: Harper-Madison donor Diane Land at Austin 78701 (same household as Adler donor row) matches Diane T. Land, spouse of former Mayor Adler, DT Land Group principal.
With husband Kirk Rudy (Endeavor co-founder, ADL board)
